name: Diazepam
description: benzodiazepine mai dogon aiki. An yi amfani da shi don sarrafa kamawa, spasm na tsoka, da anxiolysis. Gel na dubura (Diastat) yana da amfani a saitunan filin lokacin da babu IV. Tsawon lokaci fiye da lorazepam.
indications: Ciwon tsoka daga raunin kashin baya ko tetanus
Adjunct na maganin jijiya (a cikin CHEMPACK kits)
dose: Kamewa: 5-10 MG IV jinkirin turawa. Maimaita q10-15 min (max 30 MG). Matsakaicin: 0.2-0.5 mg/kg. IM absorption na kuskure -- guje wa IM idan zai yiwu.
warnings: Shanyewar IM na kuskure ne kuma mai raɗaɗi -- fi son IV, dubura, ko amfani da midazolam IM maimakon.
Tsawon lokaci na sedation (24-48h don maimaita allurai).
Masu raunin jijiya: an haɗa diazepam a cikin kayan CHEMPACK don kamawa daga rikicin cholinergic.

pediatric.dose: IV: 0.1-0.3 mg/kg (max 10 mg). Matsakaicin: 0.3-0.5 mg/kg. Yi amfani da hanyar dubura lokacin da babu IV.
pediatric.note: Gel diastat na dubura yana da amfani musamman ga ciwon yara a cikin saitunan filin.

obstetric.note: Ketare mahaifa. Zai iya haifar da hypotonia na jariri, damuwa na numfashi. Yi amfani kawai don ciwon mahaifa wanda ba ya jin daɗin magnesium.

source: JTS CPG / CHEMPACK Program / Standard Seizure Management
